---

title: "Spatial Data Sciences across the Languages (SDSL) 2024"
event:
event-url: https://spatial-data-science.github.io/2024/
location:
address:
  street: 
  city: Prague
  region:
  postcode: 
  country: Czech Republic
summary:
abstract: ""

date: 2024-09-18T09:00:00+01:00
all_day: true

publish-date: 2022-05-21T07:43:56+01:00

tags: []

featured: false

image: featured.png

url_slides: https://crosslanguage.robinlovelace.net/slides
url_code: https://crosslanguage.robinlovelace.net/slides
url_pdf:
url_video:

slides: ""

projects: []
authors: ["Robin Lovelace"]
---
